meaning: logical actor movement direction / motion pattern selector. Usually 1..4 for cardinal movement, but low3 bits and special selectors are possible

candidate Y/depth generated by C1:9ED9 from $15E9 + direction delta
direction/motion pattern delta table used by C1:9ED9
step count used by C1:9F35 and converted to $15FD by C1:9F18
